title: Cobblemon Stacked
description: Cobblemon server modpack that includes so much fun. Raids, battles, legends, ranks, crates and much much more!
body:
**Cobblemon Stacked** is a server modpack that gives players many possibilities for how they want to play the game! You can simply **catch Pokémon** you like, or you can **build houses**, statues, or anything else you like with the help of **/shop** that allows you to buy everything in bulk! **You can grind**, **fill up your Pokédex for rewards** that actually compensate you for your work, or you can **upgrade your generators** to become the richest person on the server! We offer **events, raids, shrines, crates**, and so much more! I’ll just drop our newest and first patch here to show you how much we are offering in our first official release.
- ⌂ Added Raids (Beta)
- ⌂ Added /shop
- ⌂ Added Supply Balloon
- ⌂ Added PokemonGuessingGame (Beta)
- ⌂ Added Generators
- ⌂ Added /ah
- ⌂ Added Bottle Caps
- ⌂ Added Shrines
- ⌂ Added /gemshop
- ⌂ Added Ranks
- ⌂ Added /crystals
- ⌂ Added /pokeeuro /bal /balance
- ⌂ Added /warp
- ⌂ Added /kit
- ⌂ Added Legendary Spawn
- ⌂ Added Legendary/Shiny catch notifications
- ⌂ Added a lot of missing mons
- ⌂ Added crates
- ⌂ Added AreaZero event
- ⌂ Added plots
- ⌂ Added Legendary Egg
- ⌂ Added Random Pokemon Egg
- ⌂ Added Random Shiny Pokemon Egg
- ⌂ Added /pokedexrewards
- And many more ideas are on their way to the server! Hop in and try it out!
